## Summary

- Describe the change in 1-3 bullets.

## Validation

- [ ] `make check`
- [ ] `make build`
- [ ] `make release-check`

## Context

- Linked issue or proposal:
- [ ] No linked issue needed.

## Docs And Release Notes

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated.
- [ ] No changelog entry needed.
- [ ] Docs updated.
- [ ] No doc update needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated tests for the changed behavior.
- [ ] I updated `config.example.toml` or `docs/config-recipes.md` when setup paths changed.
- [ ] I updated compatibility or maintainer docs when workflows or support claims changed.
- [ ] I updated governance or roadmap docs when ownership, decision rules, or proposal paths changed.
- [ ] I updated review, branch-protection, or ADR docs when this change affects long-lived maintenance policy.
- [ ] I updated triage or label-taxonomy docs when issue or pull-request automation changed.
